title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 541.050 - Stealing — prior trial in other state a bar
text:
541.050.  Stealing — prior trial in other state a bar. — Every person prosecuted under section 541.040 may plead a former conviction or acquittal for the same offense in another state or country, and if such plea be admitted or established, it shall be a bar to any other or further proceedings against such person.
(RSMo 1939 § 4838) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4445; 1919 § 3686; 1909 § 4897
